zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，等待方向确认
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报2101.4，24小时涨幅0.25%，价格运行于日内区间2095.74至2109.69之间，波动收敛明显。现价低于SMA(20)均线2117.09，说明短期趋势仍偏弱，市场暂处整理阶段，多空力量相对均衡。

从技术指标看，MACD数值为4.35，维持正值，意味着中期动能尚未完全转空，但Signal缺失使金叉或死叉确认不足。RSI(14)暂无数据，短线超买超卖状态难以判断，因此需更多依赖价格结构与均线位置。

关键位置方面，2095附近构成首要短线支撑，一旦跌破，可能测试2080区域；上方2109至2117形成首层阻力，若有效突破并站稳SMA(20)，有机会推动价格挑战2130附近压力位，强化反弹预期。

交易策略上，建议保持谨慎偏观察思路。激进交易者可关注2095支撑附近低吸机会，并严格设置止损；稳健型投资者更适合等待突破2117后再顺势跟进，以降低震荡行情中的误判风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2101.4, remaining under moderate pressure after failing to reclaim the 20-day moving average around 2117.1. Price action has been relatively compressed within the 2095–2110 intraday range, suggesting a consolidation phase rather than a decisive directional breakout. The slight 24-hour gain of 0.25% indicates buyers are still active near short-term support, although upside momentum remains limited while ETH stays below its near-term trend average.

The MACD reading at 4.35 continues to reflect mild bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line confirmation reduces confidence in a stronger continuation move. Meanwhile, the missing RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, making price structure and moving averages more important for directional analysis. As long as Ethereum trades beneath the SMA(20), traders may interpret rallies as corrective rather than the beginning of a sustained bullish reversal.

Immediate support is developing around 2095, aligning with the session low and a psychologically important short-term defense zone. A break below this area could expose ETH to further downside toward 2080 and potentially 2050 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is clearly visible near 2110 and then 2117, where the 20-day moving average may attract renewed selling activity. A confirmed breakout above 2120 would improve short-term sentiment considerably.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading strategy until Ethereum establishes a clearer trend direction. Buying near support with tight risk controls could remain attractive while the market holds above 2095. However, aggressive long positioning may be premature unless price closes decisively above the SMA(20). Momentum-focused traders should monitor volume expansion closely, as stronger participation would likely determine whether ETH transitions into a breakout phase or resumes broader consolidation.
